title: Sharps, Flats, & Naturals
description: Introduction to chromatic alteration using accidental symbols.

lessons.title: Going Up a Half Step
lessons.description: Learn about the sharp symbol and what it does.
lessons.prompt: Define what a sharp symbol does (raises the note by a half-step). Give an interactive exercise on the Grand Staff that requires the user to read and play various sharp notes like F#, C#, and G#.

lessons.title: Going Down a Half Step
lessons.description: Learn about the flat symbol and what it does.
lessons.prompt: Define what a flat symbol does (lowers the note by a half-step). Give an interactive exercise on the Grand Staff requiring the user to read and play flat notes like Bb, Eb, and Ab.

lessons.title: Canceling the Effect
lessons.prompt: Explain the natural symbol and the rule that accidentals carry through the measure but reset at the bar line. Provide an exercise demonstrating an accidental note followed by its natural version within the same measure.
